channel.title: kitzos — Kitzos Tools
channel.description: Latest free browser-based tools on kitzos.

item.title: Merge PDF
item.description: Combine multiple PDF files into one document. Drag to reorder pages.

item.title: Split PDF
item.description: Split a PDF into separate files by page ranges or individual pages.

item.title: PDF to JPG & JPG to PDF Converter
item.description: Convert PDF pages to JPG images, or combine JPG/PNG/WebP images into a single PDF.

item.title: Compress PDF
item.description: Shrink PDFs by re-saving structure or rasterizing pages to JPEG (best for scans).

item.title: Rotate PDF
item.description: Rotate PDF pages 90° at a time. Preview thumbnails and rotate all pages at once.

item.title: Organize PDF
item.description: Reorder and delete PDF pages with drag-and-drop thumbnails. Export a new document.

item.title: Extract PDF Pages
item.description: Pull selected pages out of a PDF into a new file or separate PDFs. Click thumbnails or type page ranges.

item.title: Sign PDF Online
item.description: Draw your signature and stamp it on a PDF document. No account or upload to servers.

item.title: Add Watermark to PDF
item.description: Add a text watermark to every page of your PDF. Adjust opacity before downloading.

item.title: Password Protect PDF
item.description: Encrypt a PDF with a password. Lock your document before sharing.

item.title: Compress Image
item.description: Reduce JPG and PNG file size with adjustable quality. No upload required.

item.title: Image Resizer
item.description: Resize images to exact pixel dimensions with optional aspect ratio lock.

item.title: Crop Image
item.description: Crop images with a rectangle, circle, or rounded frame — right in your browser.

item.title: Image Converter
item.description: Convert images between PNG, JPG, and WebP formats in your browser.

item.title: HEIC to JPG Converter
item.description: Convert iPhone HEIC photos to JPG locally. Batch convert and download as ZIP.

item.title: Flip Image
item.description: Flip images horizontally, vertically, or both. Instant preview, keeps PNG or JPG format.

item.title: Image Rotator
item.description: Rotate images 90°, 180°, or 270° in your browser. Download as PNG.

item.title: Blur & Pixelate Image
item.description: Draw rectangles to blur or pixelate sensitive areas before sharing. 100% local processing.

item.title: Image Watermark
item.description: Add draggable text watermarks with opacity, rotation, and tile mode. Export in original format.

item.title: Add Text to Image
item.description: Overlay custom text on any image with size, color, and position controls. Export PNG.

item.title: Image Collage Maker
item.description: Combine 2–4 photos into a grid collage with adjustable gap. Download as one PNG.

item.title: Passport Photo Maker
item.description: Crop to official passport sizes at 300 DPI. Export single photo or printable sheet.

item.title: GIF Maker from Images
item.description: Combine up to 50 images into an animated GIF with frame delay and loop control.

item.title: Image Color Picker
item.description: Click any pixel to get HEX, RGB, and HSL values. Copy colors with session history.

item.title: Remove EXIF Data
item.description: Strip GPS, camera, and metadata from photos by re-exporting through canvas.

item.title: Word Counter
item.description: Count words, characters, sentences, paragraphs, and estimated reading time.

item.title: Case Converter
item.description: Convert text to uppercase, lowercase, title case, camelCase, and more.

item.title: Password Generator
item.description: Create strong random passwords with customizable length and character sets.

item.title: Find and Replace
item.description: Search and replace text with optional regex support. Replace all matches at once.

item.title: Remove Line Breaks
item.description: Remove line breaks, extra spaces, and blank lines from text instantly.

item.title: Markdown to HTML
item.description: Convert Markdown to HTML with a live preview and copy-ready output.

item.title: Lorem Ipsum Generator
item.description: Generate placeholder paragraphs, sentences, or words for mockups and drafts.

item.title: Text Diff Checker
item.description: Compare two texts side by side with highlighted additions and deletions.

item.title: Slug Generator
item.description: Convert titles to clean URL slugs with lowercase letters and hyphens.

item.title: Arabic Diacritics Remover
item.description: Remove Arabic tashkeel (harakat) from text instantly. Fully client-side.

item.title: Line Sorter
item.description: Sort lines alphabetically, reverse order, or randomly. Optionally remove duplicate lines.

item.title: Word Frequency Counter
item.description: Count how often each word appears in text and sort results by frequency.

item.title: Online Notepad
item.description: A simple notepad that auto-saves to your browser. Word and character count included.

item.title: Text Reverser
item.description: Reverse entire text, individual lines, or word order. Useful for puzzles and testing.

item.title: Text to ASCII Art
item.description: Convert text to ASCII art banners using figlet fonts. Runs in your browser.

item.title: Character Map
item.description: Browse special Unicode characters and symbols. Click to copy any character instantly.

item.title: QR Code Generator
item.description: Create styled QR codes for links, Wi‑Fi, contacts, and more. Logo and colors stay in your browser.

item.title: Barcode Generator
item.description: Generate CODE128, EAN13, UPC, and CODE39 barcodes from text. Download as PNG.

item.title: JSON Formatter
item.description: Format, validate, and minify JSON with clear error messages.

item.title: Base64 Encoder / Decoder
item.description: Encode and decode text or images to Base64. Works entirely offline.

item.title: Hash Generator
item.description: Generate MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, and SHA-512 hashes from any text.

item.title: UUID Generator
item.description: Generate random UUID v4 identifiers. Create 1–20 UUIDs and copy them all at once.

item.title: Color Picker
item.description: Pick a color and convert between HEX, RGB, and HSL formats.

item.title: Color Code Converter
item.description: Convert between HEX, RGB, HSL, and HSV color formats from a single input value.

item.title: Color Palette Generator
item.description: Generate complementary, analogous, and triadic color palettes from a base color.

item.title: Regex Tester
item.description: Test and debug regular expressions with live highlighting. See matches and groups as you type. Runs entirely in your browser.

item.title: JWT Decoder
item.description: Decode and inspect JSON Web Tokens. View header, payload, and signature instantly in your browser. No data leaves your device.

item.title: CSV ↔ JSON Converter
item.description: Convert CSV to JSON and JSON to CSV instantly in your browser. Paste data or upload a file. Nothing is uploaded to a server.

item.title: JSON to TypeScript
item.description: Convert JSON objects to TypeScript interfaces automatically. Nested objects become named interfaces.

item.title: URL Encoder / Decoder
item.description: Encode or decode URL components with encodeURIComponent and decodeURIComponent.

item.title: CSS Minifier & Formatter
item.description: Minify or beautify CSS. Remove comments and whitespace for production or readable output.

item.title: JavaScript Minifier
item.description: Minify JavaScript with Terser in your browser. Compress and mangle for smaller bundles.

item.title: XML Formatter
item.description: Format or minify XML markup. Pretty-print with indentation or compress for transport.

item.title: SQL Formatter
item.description: Format SQL queries with proper indentation. Supports standard SQL syntax.

item.title: CSS Gradient Generator
item.description: Create linear and radial CSS gradients with a live preview and copy-ready code.

item.title: Box Shadow Generator
item.description: Design CSS box shadows with live preview and copy ready-to-use code.

item.title: Glassmorphism Generator
item.description: Design frosted-glass CSS effects with live preview. Copy blur, border, and background code.

item.title: SVG Pattern Generator
item.description: Create repeating SVG background patterns and copy the CSS code.

item.title: Open Graph Image Generator
item.description: Create 1200×630 OG images for social sharing with custom title and colors.

item.title: Favicon Generator
item.description: Generate favicon PNGs in multiple sizes from one image and download as ZIP.

item.title: Meta Tag Generator
item.description: Generate HTML meta, Open Graph, and Twitter Card tags from title, description, URL, and image.

item.title: Click Ripple Effect Generator
item.description: Preview material-style ripple clicks and export CSS + JS using Pointer Events.

item.title: .htaccess Redirect Generator
item.description: Generate Apache mod_rewrite 301 or 302 redirect rules for .htaccess files.

item.title: Cron Expression Parser
item.description: Parse standard 5-field cron expressions into human-readable English descriptions.

item.title: Placeholder Image Generator
item.description: Create custom-size placeholder PNG images with dimensions text. No external API required.

item.title: Percentage Calculator
item.description: Find percentages, percent of a number, and percentage increase or decrease between values.

item.title: Tip Calculator
item.description: Calculate tip amount and split a restaurant bill evenly between any number of people.

item.title: Discount Calculator
item.description: Calculate sale price after a percentage discount and see how much you save.

item.title: BMI Calculator
item.description: Calculate your Body Mass Index from height and weight. Supports metric and imperial units.

item.title: Calorie Calculator
item.description: Estimate daily calories using the Mifflin-St Jeor equation. BMR and TDEE for maintain, lose, or gain.

item.title: Loan Calculator
item.description: Calculate monthly payments, total interest, and total cost for fixed-rate loans.

item.title: Mortgage Calculator
item.description: Estimate monthly mortgage payments, total interest, and view an amortization schedule with down payment.

item.title: Compound Interest Calculator
item.description: Project investment growth with compound interest. Choose compounding frequency and see total returns.

item.title: Age Calculator
item.description: Calculate your exact age in years, months, and days from your birth date. See days until your next birthday.

item.title: Date Difference Calculator
item.description: Find the difference between two dates in days, weeks, months, and years. Count days until or since a date.

item.title: Due Date Calculator
item.description: Estimate pregnancy due date from your last menstrual period and see current pregnancy week.

item.title: GPA Calculator
item.description: Calculate weighted GPA on a 4.0 scale from course credits and letter grades.

item.title: Fuel Cost Calculator
item.description: Estimate fuel needed and trip cost from distance, consumption (L/100km or MPG), and fuel price.

item.title: Aspect Ratio Calculator
item.description: Find image and video aspect ratios, use presets like 16:9, and scale width or height proportionally.

item.title: Unit Converter
item.description: Convert length, weight, area, and volume between common units instantly.

item.title: Temperature Converter
item.description: Convert Celsius, Fahrenheit, and Kelvin with helpful reference notes.

item.title: Cooking Unit Converter
item.description: Convert cups, tablespoons, teaspoons, milliliters, and grams for recipes.

item.title: Data Unit Converter
item.description: Convert bits, bytes, storage sizes, and network speeds (Mbps, Gbps) instantly.

item.title: File Size Converter
item.description: Convert between bytes, KB, MB, GB, TB using binary (1024) or decimal (1000) bases.

item.title: Roman Numeral Converter
item.description: Convert between Arabic numerals and Roman numerals (I, V, X, L, C, D, M). Supports 1–3999.

item.title: Number to Words — Tafqit
item.description: Convert numbers to words in English or Arabic (tafqit). Supports large numbers up to billions.

item.title: Hijri Gregorian Converter
item.description: Convert dates between Hijri (Islamic) and Gregorian calendars. Fully client-side.

item.title: Timestamp Converter
item.description: Convert Unix timestamps to dates and back. Supports seconds and milliseconds.

item.title: Number Base Converter
item.description: Convert numbers between binary, octal, decimal, and hexadecimal instantly in your browser.

item.title: Pomodoro Timer
item.description: Focus timer with work and break cycles. Customizable durations, cycle counter, and sound alerts.

item.title: Stopwatch & Countdown Timer
item.description: Online stopwatch with lap times and countdown timer with audio alert. Fully client-side.

item.title: Spin Wheel Picker
item.description: Spin a wheel of fortune to pick a random name or option from a list, or generate a random number in any range.

item.title: Typing Speed Test
item.description: Measure your typing speed in WPM and accuracy with a live typing test.

item.title: Signature Generator PNG
item.description: Draw a transparent signature and download as PNG for documents and forms.

item.title: MP3 Cutter Online
item.description: Cut and trim audio files in your browser. Export as MP3 or WAV — no upload required.

item.title: Audio Converter
item.description: Convert WAV to MP3 and other audio formats locally using Web Audio API.

item.title: Audio Merger
item.description: Merge multiple audio files into one track. Combine clips in order and download.

item.title: Online Voice Recorder
item.description: Record voice from your microphone and download instantly. Private browser recording.
